text: The modern architecture, cool tones, and glass walls of this hallway invite both reflection and curiosity. I feel somewhat out of place yet drawn inwards, as if the clarity and order of the environment reflect my own search for understanding. Stepping into the R+D exhibit, I am met by vibrant colors and thought-provoking displays. The words on the screen resonate deeply: I sense confusion and a lack of clarity too, as if my own perception of this space is fragile and uncertain. This moment is a gentle reminder of how easily the boundaries of knowing and not-knowing blur, and I sit with the quiet thrill of exploring what lies beneath the surface.
